summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of fully restored Pipeline page. All 14 features verified successfully. Hero carousel with filter pills, prev/next navigation, counter (1/N), and peek row all working. Priority/Pipeline toggle switches between PriorityBoard and KanbanBoard views. RecapTeaser displays momentum data. PriorityBoard shows ACT NOW / KEEP MOMENTUM / MONITOR sections with correct styling (red/orange/green accents, white card backgrounds).
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (5 schools for Emma Chen)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline page fully restored with all logic intact. Hero carousel, toggle, kanban, recap teaser, peek row all working. PriorityBoard uses ACT NOW / KEEP MOMENTUM / MONITOR labels with correct accent colors.

verified_features.1_hero_carousel_filter_pills: PASS - All/Urgent/Soon filter pills found with counts (All 4, Urgent 3, Soon 1)
verified_features.2_hero_carousel_navigation: PASS - Prev/Next buttons work, counter updates (1/4 → 2/4)
verified_features.4_hero_peek_row: PASS - 'Also:' row shows school names (Emory · Overdue 4d, Florida · Tomorrow, UCLA · Tomorrow)
verified_features.5_priority_pipeline_toggle: PASS - Both Priority and Pipeline toggle buttons found and functional
verified_features.6_kanban_board_pipeline_view: PASS - KanbanBoard renders with 5 columns (Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offered)
verified_features.7_recap_teaser_priority_view: PASS - RecapTeaser shows 'MOMENTUM RECAP' with heated/steady/cooling pills
verified_features.8_priority_board_sections: PASS - ACT NOW (3), KEEP MOMENTUM (1), MONITOR (1) sections found
verified_features.9_act_now_card_styling: PASS - Red left accent (#ef4444), white background, reason text, action text, View CTA
verified_features.10_keep_momentum_card_styling: PASS - Orange left accent (#f59e0b), white background, View School CTA
verified_features.11_monitor_section_collapsible: PASS - MONITOR section header is collapsible, shows Creighton University
verified_features.12_board_separator: PASS - 'MANAGE ALL PROGRAMS' separator between recap and board
verified_features.13_hero_why_button: PASS - 'Why this surfaced' button expands priority factors panel
verified_features.14_owner_label: PASS - 'You' badge visible on hero card meta line

accent_colors.act_now_red: rgb(239, 68, 68) / #ef4444 - Confirmed on ACT NOW card border-left
accent_colors.keep_momentum_orange: rgb(245, 158, 11) / #f59e0b - Confirmed on KEEP MOMENTUM card border-left
accent_colors.monitor_green: #10b981 - Green dot indicator in MONITOR section

hero_card.elements: School name, match score, badges (NEEDS ATTENTION, timing), progress rail, CTAs (View School, View details), Why this surfaced button

design_verification.white_cards: All priority cards use white background (#fff) with colored left border accents

testing_notes.login_method: Fill email and password, press Enter on password field
testing_notes.navigation: After login redirects to /board, click 'My Schools' to navigate to /pipeline
testing_notes.data_state: 5 programs: Emory (high/overdue 4d), Stanford (high/tomorrow), Florida (high/tomorrow), UCLA (medium/tomorrow), Creighton (low/on-track)

comparison_with_previous_test.iteration_210: Tested stripped-down version with MomentumInsight and PipelineList
comparison_with_previous_test.iteration_211: Tested fully restored version with Hero carousel, RecapTeaser, KanbanBoard, PriorityBoard toggle
